quests.title: The Purification
quests.description: Grand Justiciar Aurelius speaks: the Dune Outskirts must be purified. Dune Scavengers defile the sacred sands.

quests.title: Dune Stalkers
quests.description: Dune Stalkers hunt Legion supply caravans. A Legionnaire does not flee — we hunt the hunters.

quests.title: Scorched Scarab Purge
quests.description: Scorched Scarabs burrow beneath Legion outposts. Dig them out. A Legionnaire fights on any terrain.

quests.title: Sand Runner Trial
quests.description: Sand Runners are swift, but a Legionnaire is relentless. Run them down.

quests.title: The Choosing
quests.description: Centurion Valka summons you to Fortress Kaelen. Your soul must be forged into a weapon through class specialization.

objectives.description: Prove your worth against Dune Gnashers.

quests.title: Justice in the Badlands
quests.description: The Scorched Badlands are lawless. Legion brings order. Establish a forward command post.

quests.title: Ash Hound Hunt
quests.description: Ash Hounds are fire made flesh. A Legionnaire faces fire without fear. Hunt them.

quests.title: Scorpion Extermination
quests.description: Dune Scorpions poison Legion water supplies. Exterminate them.

quests.title: Dune Stinger
quests.description: The Dune Stinger — alpha predator of the sands — terrorizes Legion patrols. A Legionnaire does not know terror. Bring it down.

quests.title: Enforcer's Fall
quests.description: A Scrapfield Enforcer has claimed the Badlands as its territory. Challenge its authority. Legion bows to no one.

quests.title: Sentinels of Light
quests.description: The Mesa Warpath is the proving ground of Legion warriors. March forward and claim your territory.

quests.title: Warpath Scout
quests.description: Warpath Scouts are enemy forward elements. A Legionnaire strikes first.

quests.title: Warpath Veteran
quests.description: Warpath Veterans are seasoned enemy warriors. Prove that Legion training is superior.

quests.title: Champion's Duel
quests.description: A Warpath Champion issues a direct challenge. Legion answers all challenges. Face them in single combat.

objectives.description: Defeat Warpath Champions in single combat.

quests.title: War Path Sweep
quests.description: Sweep the Warpath clean of all hostile forces. Leave nothing standing that is not Legion.

quests.title: Champion's Cohort
quests.description: Multiple Warpath Champions coordinate against Legion. Break their coordination with superior tactics.

quests.title: Intel Recovery
quests.description: Recover Legion intelligence from fallen scouts on the Warpath. Their sacrifice must be honored.

quests.title: The Echo's Challenge
quests.description: A Resonance Echo manifests on the Warpath. This entity mocks Legion honor. Destroy it.

quests.title: Warpath Mastery
quests.description: Complete the Warpath mastery trial. Prove you are worthy of the Advanced rank.

quests.title: The Trial of Resonance
quests.description: Return to Fortress Kaelen. Your Advanced Promotion ceremony awaits before Grand Justiciar Aurelius himself.

quests.title: The Trinity Trial
quests.description: Face Jotunn, Drake, and Harbinger simultaneously. No Legionnaire has ever faced such odds. You will be the first.

quests.title: Eternity of Honor
quests.description: The Eternal Titan and Harbinger have fallen. Return to Fortress Kaelen. Grand Justiciar Aurelius declares you ETERNAL LEGIONNAIRE. Iman melalui Ujian. Persatuan melalui Pengorbanan. Selamanya.

objectives.description: Receive Grand Justiciar Aurelius's eternal commendation.
